replacements.replace: async resolveWorkspaceRoot(e){try{const t=Qe(e,this.host),i=await Se.stat(t);if(i.isDirectory())return y.resolve(t);if(i.isFile()){const n=y.dirname(t),o=await Se.stat(n);if(o.isDirectory())return y.resolve(n)}return null}catch(t){return B().warning("Failed to stat workspace root",{safe:{},sensitive:{error:t}}),null}}
